The position is responsible for managing and optimizing production operations of the VCM/PVC plant to ensure safe, efficient, and continuous manufacturing. The role involves supervising plant operations through Distributed Control Systems (DCS), coordinating with maintenance and technical teams, and ensuring compliance with safety, environmental, and operational standards. job_title: Production Superintendent (PVC) - Tasnim Chemical Complex Ltd.
job_description: Production Superintendent (PVC) - Tasnim Chemical Complex Ltd. : Meghna Group of Industries. Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Meghna Group of Industries. Production Superintendent (PVC) - Tasnim Chemical Complex Ltd. Application Deadline : 18 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Company Information Summary Vacancy: -- Location: Narayanganj Salary: Negotiable Experience: At least 10 years Published: 12 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Bachelor of Science (BSc) in Chemical Technical/Engineering Experience At least 10 years The applicants should have experience in the following business area(s): Chemical Industries Responsibilities & Context Job Context: Tasnim Chemical Complex Ltd. (TCCL) is the sister concern of Meghna Group of Industries (MGI). This chemical unit is engaged in the production of Caustic Soda, Hydrogen Peroxide, Hydrochloric Acid and Liquid Chlorine etc. We are currently looking for a highly experienced petrochemical professional to lead the operations, stabilization, and performance optimization of chemicals like PVC, VCM and other associated chemicals. This will ensure efficient plant operation. Job Responsibilities: Supervise and manage continuous operation of a large-scale PVC production unit through DCS, coordinating with field operators and technical teams to ensure safe, efficient plant performance and consistent product quality. Lead shift operations, monitoring key parameters and optimizing reactors, stripping columns, compressors, centrifuges, and fluidized bed dryers during startup, shutdown, and steady-state operations. Support erection, commissioning, and startup of PVC production facilities, including commissioning of reactors, pumps, compressors, blowers, and process equipment, as well as conducting hydro testing of pipelines and storage tanks. Oversee VCM storage and handling operations, including ship unloading and storage in double-wall double-integrity cryogenic tanks, ensuring adherence to safety standards and operational procedures. Coordinate raw material planning and utility support services for plant startup and continuous operations while ensuring optimal production output and product quality through statistical process control techniques. Participate in process safety initiatives, including HAZOP studies and risk assessments, ensuring compliance with plant safety procedures, environmental regulations, and operational standards. Review P&ID, PFD, and process documentation, and contribute to equipment inspections and operational readiness of vessels, pipelines, and process units. Ensure achievement of production targets, plant reliability, workplace safety, and environmental compliance, while guiding DCS and field operators for smooth shift operations. Skills & Expertise DCS HAZOP Quality Management Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full

Senior Executive / Assistant Manager (HR Operations & Payroll) Application Deadline : 11 Apr 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 1 Age: 21 to 35 years Location: Dhaka (Mirpur12) Salary: Negotiable Published: 12 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 21 to 35 years PGD in HRM will get preference. Certification or training in Payroll Management, Compensation & Benefits, or Labor Law will be considered an advantage. 3–5 years of experience in HR Operations and Payroll management. Experience in BPO/ITES industry will be preferred. Good understanding of Bangladesh Labor Law and payroll compliance. Strong skills in MS Excel and HRIS/payroll systems. Good analytical, communication, and interpersonal skills. Ability to work in a dynamic and diversified work environment. Responsibilities & Context Manage end-to-end HR operational activities , including employee onboarding, confirmation, transfer, promotion, and separation. Maintain and update employee records, HR documentation, and HRIS databases . Prepare and process monthly payroll accurately and on time , including salary, allowances, overtime, and deductions. Ensure compliance with Bangladesh Labor Law, company policies, and statutory regulations related to payroll and HR operations. Coordinate with the Accounts/Finance team for payroll reconciliation and related reporting. Manage leave, attendance, and employee benefits administration . Prepare payroll related reports, HR reports, and management dashboards when required. Handle employee queries related to payroll, benefits, and HR policies . Support HR management in performance management processes and employee engagement initiatives . Assist in disciplinary procedures, grievance handling, and HR compliance activities . job_title: Registrar- Dept of Gynae and Obs
job_description: Registrar- Dept of Gynae and Obs : Institute of Applied Health Sciences (IAHS) USTC Complex, Foy’s Lake, Khulshi, Chattogram Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Institute of Applied Health Sciences (IAHS) USTC Complex, Foy’s Lake, Khulshi, Chattogram Registrar- Dept of Gynae and Obs Application Deadline : 11 Apr 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Company Information Summary Vacancy: 02 Location: Chattogram Salary: Negotiable Published: 12 Mar 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Education Additional Requirements Excellent interpersonal skills with good communication skills. Responsibilities & Context Dept of Gynae and Obs, IAHS has been accredited for 1 (one) years core training by Bangladesh College of Physicians and Surgeons. Applications are invited on an urgent basis for the position  of Registrar, Dept of Gynae and Obs, in IAHS on the following terms and conditions: Job Responsibilities Provide clinical services to the respective department. Diagnose illnesses, develop treatment plans, and prescribe medications in accordance with established protocols and guidelines. Perform medical procedures and interventions as required, including but not limited to injections, wound care, and minor surgical procedures. Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate interventions to stabilise patients as needed. Work collaboratively with other members of the healthcare team, including physicians, nurses, therapists, and support staff, to ensure coordinated and comprehensive patient care. Ensure compliance with documentation standards, regulatory requirements, and patient confidentiality guidelines. Conduct lectures for MBBS students as per the academic schedule. Participate in regular ward rounds and supervise patient admissions. Take clinical items and assist in the completion of students’ cards. Conduct evening classes for MBBS students and medical internees. Conduct regular phase-wise classes, including evening ward classes and clinical sessions as per the approved schedule. Prepare and maintain updated lecture timetables and ward/class schedules. Participate in quality improvement initiatives aimed at enhancing patient safety, clinical outcomes, and overall healthcare delivery within the Dept. Engage in peer review, case presentations, and other activities to promote clinical excellence and knowledge sharing among colleagues. Application Insights View Requirements Education Additional Requirements Age At most 32 years অভিজ্ঞতার প্রয়োজন নেই (অভিজ্ঞদের আবেদন করার প্রয়োজন নেই)। সর্বোচ্চ বয়স অনূর্ধ্ব ৩২ বছর। আবেদনকারীদের আম্বালার ক্ষুদ্রঋণ কার্যক্রমের কর্মএলাকায় বাংলাদেশের যে কোনো স্থানে কাজ করার মানসিকতা থাকতে হবে। কম্পিউটার পরিচালনায় অভিজ্ঞ প্রার্থীদের অগ্রাধিকার দেওয়া হবে। বৈধ লাইসেন্সসহ মোটরসাইকেল চালনা বাধ্যতামূলক। ২০,০০০/- (বিশ হাজার) টাকা জামানত (লভ্যাংশসহ ফেরতযোগ্য) জমা দিতে হবে। জামিনদারের স্বাক্ষরিত ক্রস ব্যাংক চেক জমা দিতে হবে। নোয়াখালী, লক্ষ্মীপুর, ফেনী, চট্টগ্রাম এবং কক্সবাজার জেলার আগ্রহী প্রার্থীদের অগ্রাধিকার দেওয়া হবে। Responsibilities & Context জব কন্টেন্ট : আম্বালা ফাউন্ডেশন একটি অলাভজনক, বিদেশি অনুদানমুক্ত সম্পূর্ণ আত্মনির্ভর সংস্থা, যা ১৯৯৪ সালে প্রতিষ্ঠিত হয়। সংস্থাটি সমাজকল্যাণ মন্ত্রণালয়ে (নিবন্ধন নম্বর: ঢ-০৩০৬৬), এনজিও বিষয়ক ব্যুরো (নিবন্ধন নম্বর: ৯৫২) এবং এম.আর.এ কর্তৃক সনদপ্রাপ্ত (সনদ নং: ০০৩৫০-০১৩০৮-০০০৮৬) হয়ে অত্যন্ত সক্ষমতার সাথে ক্ষুদ্র আর্থিক সেবা কার্যক্রম পরিচালনা করে আসছে। সংস্থাটি বর্তমানে ২১টি জেলায় ২৪১টি শাখার মাধ্যমে সফলতার সাথে ঋণ কার্যক্রম পরিচালনা করছে। সংস্থাটি পিকেএসএফ-এর পার্টনার। এছাড়াও বিভিন্ন ব্যাংক ও আর্থিক প্রতিষ্ঠানের সাথেও পার্টনারশিপ রয়েছে। অত্র প্রতিষ্ঠানের অন্তর্ভুক্তিমূলক আর্থিক কার্যক্রম পরিচালনার জন্য জরুরি ভিত্তিতে নিম্নবর্ণিত যোগ্যতা ও শর্ত সাপেক্ষে ক্রেডিট অফিসার পদে জনবল নিয়োগ করা হবে। এরই প্রেক্ষিতে আগ্রহী প্রার্থীদের নিম্নে বর্ণিত নিয়মে আবেদন করার জন্য আহ্বান জানানো হচ্ছে। কর্মস্থল : আম্বালার ক্ষুদ্রঋণ কার্যক্রমের কর্মএলাকায় বাংলাদেশের যে কোনো স্থানে। চাকরির ধরণ: স্থায়ী Skills & Expertise Suggested by Microcredit microfinance Documentations Customer Relationship Management Teamwork Time Management Compensation & Other Benefits বেতন : প্রশিক্ষণকাল ০১ মাস এবং মাসে ৫,০০০/- টাকা হারে ভাতা প্রদান করা হবে। সফলতার সাথে প্রশিক্ষণকাল সম্পন্ন করার পর মূল্যায়নের ভিত্তিতে শিক্ষানবিশ কর্মী হিসেবে নিয়োগ দেওয়া হবে। শিক্ষানবিশকালীন বেতন - ২৮,৬০০/- টাকা এবং স্থায়ী হওয়ার পর সংস্থার নির্ধারিত বেতন স্কেল অনুযায়ী বেতন-ভাতা - ৩৩,২৩৪/- টাকা। সুযোগ-সুবিধা : বছরে বৈশাখী ভাতাসহ ০৩টি উৎসব বোনাস প্রভিডেন্ট ফান্ড গ্র্যাচুইটি সুবিধা বাৎসরিক ইনক্রিমেন্ট এলপিআর সুবিধা সাপ্তাহিক ছুটি ০২ দিন অর্জিত ছুটি মাঠ পর্যায়ে পুরুষ কর্মীদের জন্য বিনা খরচে একক আবাসন সুবিধা এবং নারী কর্মীদের ক্ষেত্রে বেতনের অতিরিক্ত ১,০০০/- টাকা একক আবাসন ভাতা প্রদান করা হয়। এছাড়া মোটরসাইকেল মেইনটেন্যান্স ও জ্বালানির জন্য নির্ধারিত খরচ প্রদান করা হবে। Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Job Location Anywhere in Banglad

Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Minimum 8 years of experience in continuous chemical and petrochemical manufacturing plants.Out of total experiences, minimum 3–5 years of experience in VCM / PET / PVC production operations or similar polymer/chemical process units. Hands-on experience in DCS-based plant operation, shift supervision, and process monitoring in large-scale continuous process industries. Experience in plant start-up, shutdown, troubleshooting, and coordination with maintenance and utility teams will be preferred. Strong understanding of VCM/PET/PVC production processes and continuous chemical plant operations. Ability to work in continuous process manufacturing environments and rotational shift operations. Responsibilities & Context Job Context: Tasnim Chemical Complex Ltd. (TCCL) are sister concern of Meghna Group of Industries (MGI). These chemical units are engaged in the production of Caustic Soda, Hydrogen Peroxide, Hydrochloric Acid, and Liquid Chlorine. We are currently looking for Shift Incharge (VCM/PET/PVC). The Shift Incharge (VCM/PET/PVC) is responsible for supervising shift-wise operations of the continuous chemical production unit to ensure safe, stable, and efficient plant performance. The role involves monitoring and controlling plant processes through Distributed Control Systems (DCS), coordinating with field operators and maintenance teams, and ensuring adherence to operational procedures and safety standards. The incumbent will oversee start-up, shutdown, troubleshooting, and process optimization activities while maintaining production targets and consistent product quality in VCM/PET/PVC manufacturing operations. Job Responsibilities: Supervise shift-wise operations of VCM/PET/PVC production units by coordinating with panel and field operators through DCS monitoring to ensure safe and continuous plant operation. Monitor critical process parameters of reactors, distillation columns, compressors, and polymerization systems through DCS and field inspections to maintain stable operating conditions and product quality. Control plant process conditions by adjusting operating parameters through DCS and coordinating with field teams to achieve targeted production efficiency. Execute plant start-up, shutdown, and emergency handling procedures by following approved SOPs and operational guidelines to ensure safe and reliable process op

Application Insights View Requirements Education Responsibilities & Context BRAC is an international development organisation founded in Bangladesh that partners with over 100 million people living with inequality and poverty globally to create sustainable opportunities to realise potential. Working at BRAC is not like any other job. It is a platform where you can bring about real change for people who need it the most. We are not just dreaming of a better world, we are building it. Join us to find the way. Project Brief: The "Unlocking Financial Solutions for Youth Enterprise Development" / "Access to Capital and Entrepreneurial Skills for Success (ACCESS)" Project aims to support youth entrepreneurs in Bangladesh by improving their access to financial resources and strengthening their entrepreneurial capabilities. Implemented by BRAC in collaboration with Education Above All, the project focuses on addressing the limited access to conventional financial resources faced by youth (aged 18–35) who aspire to develop or expand their income-generating ventures. Through this initiative, BRAC will extend loans to these young entrepreneurs to improve the economic well-being of both the youths and their households. Additionally, the project will provide financial literacy, entrepreneurship skills training, and mentorship support to young entrepreneurs to enhance their ventures' sustainability. The project end date is 30 September 2026. We are inviting applications from the interested candidates for the following position to implement the project. Job Purpose: The person will be responsible for ensuring the effective field-level implementation of project activities by coordinating and managing the field team and maintaining strong collaboration with internal and external stakeholders. The role supports the Head Office in implementing programme interventions, facilitating local-level trainings and meetings, and ensuring timely financial and technical reporting. Additionally, the position promotes and upholds safeguarding standards, ensuring a safe and supportive environment for programme participants, stakeholders, and team members. Key Responsibilities: Implement field-level execution plans to ensure the timely and smooth delivery of project activities. Ability to coordinate and cooperate with existing and potential development partners/donors. Excellent interpersonal skills and a solution-focused approach to professional relationships. Ability to consult and negotiate with the management team and donor partners. Active listening skills and the ability to deal with sensitive situations with integrity Have an understanding about all RDRS policies and manuals. Influencing skills, Polite & Reasonable Speaking & understanding regarding the local language in Chattagrom will get preference Responsibilities & Context A. Summary of Project: RDRS Emergency Response Program (RERP) has been implementing an emergency response program in Rohingya camps and nearby host communities in Cox’s Bazar district since 2019. The RERP contributes to international efforts to meet the humanitarian, and protection needs and increase self-reliance and resilience of the Forcibly Displaced Myanmar Nationals (FDMNs) and host communities through income-generating Activities (IGAs), tree plantation, life skills with livelihoods, and leadership development training. RERP also works on capacity building of youth and creates market linkage to improve their living standard. This program also aims at cultivating social cohesion, ensuring social inclusion, promoting reforestation and providing humanitarian support (i.e., food and non-food items, food security, livelihoods, nutrition, WASH, health, protection, etc.) to the FDMNs as well as the nearby host communities A. job_description: Assistant Registrar - Dept of Paediatrics : Institute of Applied Health Sciences Hospital (IAHS-H),USTC Complex, Foy’s Lake, Chattogram, Bangla Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Institute of Applied Health Sciences Hospital (IAHS-H),USTC Complex, Foy’s Lake, Chattogram, Bangla Assistant Registrar - Dept of Paediatrics Application Deadline : 11 Apr 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Company Information Summary Vacancy: -- Location: Chattogram Salary: Negotiable Published: 12 Mar 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Education Additional Requirements Excellent interpersonal skills with good communication skills. Responsibilities & Context Job Context Dept of Paediatrics, IAHS has been accredited for 2 (two) years core training by Bangladesh College of Physicians and Surgeons. Applications are invited from qualified candidates on an urgent basis for this position in IAHS-H on the following terms and conditions: Job Responsibilities Provide clinical services to patients under the care of the department. Ensure round-the-clock (24/7) patient care, including the supervision of emergency and inpatient management. Supervise and coordinate the activities of Medical Officers (MOs), Intern Doctors, medical students, and nursing staff. Attend and manage patients in the Outpatient Department (OPD), Emergency Unit, and inpatient wards, assisting senior physicians in diagnosis and treatment. Accompany consultants during clinical rounds, ensuring accurate documentation and implementation of their instructions. Maintain detailed and up-to-date records of patient care, treatment plans, and clinical progress. Conduct and organize educational activities and training sessions for intern doctors, IMOs/MOs, nursing staff, and clinical students during classes and ward rounds. Participate in Continuing Medical Education (CME) sessions and promote professional knowledge-sharing. Ensure the presence and punctuality of on-duty physicians, nurses, and support staff according to the official duty roster. Collaborate closely with nursing staff, administrative personnel, and other clinical departments to ensure coordinated and efficient patient care. Perform physical exams on patients, including checking for signs of disease, trauma, or other medical conditions. Provide counselling or other psychological services to patients with mental health issues. Maintain records of patient visits and treatment plans in order to track patient progress. Prescribe and interpret appropriate lab tests to gain more information for possible infections or abnormalities. Weekday duty hours: 8:00 AM to 2:30 PM. Weekday evening duty hours: 7:00 PM to 9:00 PM. Work beyond regular office hours as per instructions from the respective Department Head or the competent authority. Piping Foreman : Industrial Project Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Industrial Project Piping Foreman Application Deadline : 11 Apr 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Company Information Summary Vacancy: -- Location: Anywhere in Bangladesh Published: 12 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Experience Additional Requirements Requirements: Minimum 5–7 years of experience in piping installation or fabrication works, including experience in a foreman role. Strong knowledge of piping systems, installation procedures, and construction practices. Ability to read and understand piping drawings and isometric diagrams. Good leadership and team coordination skills. Familiarity with workplace safety standards and site procedures. Technical training or certification in mechanical or piping works is preferred. Preferred Skills: Experience in managing piping crews on large industrial construction sites. Strong organizational and problem-solving abilities. Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced project environment. Responsibilities & Context Job Summary: We are looking for an experienced Piping Foreman to lead and supervise piping installation and fabrication activities at a large industrial project site. The successful candidate will be responsible for coordinating daily work tasks, guiding the piping team, and ensuring that all activities are carried out according to engineering drawings, specifications, and safety standards. Key Responsibilities: Supervise and lead a team of pipe fitters, fabricators, and helpers during piping installation and assembly works. Interpret piping drawings, isometric diagrams, and layout plans to guide the workforce effectively. Plan and assign daily tasks to workers to ensure smooth progress of piping activities. Ensure proper alignment, routing, and fit-up of pipes, fittings, and supports before welding. Monitor work quality and ensure compliance with project specifications and standards. Coordinate with supervisors, engineers, and other construction teams to maintain workflow. Ensure proper use of tools, equipment, and materials on site. Maintain a safe working environment and enforce safety rules and procedures. Report daily progress, manpower utilization, and site issues to the supervisor. Assist in resolving technical and operational issues during installation activities.
